name: search
description: High-accuracy web search via Parallel.ai API optimized for AI agents. Use this for deep research requiring cross-referenced facts, company/person research with citations, fact-checking with evidence-based outputs, and complex queries needing multi-hop reasoning. This provides higher accuracy than traditional search engines for research tasks. For simple lookups, consider using standard web search instead.

query.description: Search query or research objective (e.g., 'Who is the CEO of Anthropic?', 'latest AI news')

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

mode.description: Search mode: 'one-shot' for simple queries, 'agentic' for complex multi-hop reasoning tasks

json.description: Output raw JSON instead of formatted text
